title: WorkItem
description: Abstract parent of all Cloverleaf trackable units (RFC, Spike, Plan, Task).
$comment: Permissive at the abstract level (additionalProperties: true); concrete types (rfc/spike/plan/task) tighten via additionalProperties: false. Reusable component definitions live under $defs and are $ref'd by per-type schemas.

status.description: Lifecycle status. The set of valid statuses depends on the concrete type and is defined in per-type schemas.

workItemIdOrNull.description: A Work Item id, or null when no parent applies.

dependencyList.description: Work Item ids this item depends on. Must be unique.

owner.description: Identifies who owns a Work Item — a human or an agent. A subset of `actor`: ownership is restricted to addressable parties (no `system`).

actor.description: Identifies who triggered an action — a human, an agent, or the system itself (for automated transitions like timeouts, scheduled jobs, build outcomes). Used by event schemas. Superset of `owner` (`owner` is `actor` minus `system`).
